product: Tacit — private work exchange for software agents (two live services: vendor security + web performance), a Buyer Agent Console, a live auditor-view market, and an ADDITIVE feature-flagged on-ledger spending mandate (tacit-mandate; flag OFF by default, dormant this submission — see onLedgerSpendingMandate)

frozenPackagesUntouchedThisPass.sourceDiff: git diff daml/ daml3/ tacit-work/ daml3-test/ tacit-work-test/ == 0 bytes

onLedgerSpendingMandate.package: tacit-mandate (standalone; no data-dependency on frozen packages; links to jobs by Text jobId/rfsId)
onLedgerSpendingMandate.flagOffIsBitForBit: every mandate code path in work.ts is guarded by mandateModeOn(); all response additions are optional/spread-guarded, so with the flag off the /api/work/procure response and the /work UI are byte-for-byte today's; /api/mandate/status returns 404
onLedgerSpendingMandate.safetyStory: each procurement authorizes its spend against a private on-ledger budget envelope; an over-budget/expired/out-of-scope spend is a REAL on-ledger command failure (assertMsg in the Authorize choice), never simulated; a pre-check refuses over-budget jobs BEFORE any ledger write (HTTP 402 MANDATE_INSUFFICIENT, zero writes)
onLedgerSpendingMandate.sequencingDisclosure: authorization and award are SEPARATE sequential Canton transactions — NOT atomic; the invariant proven is only that the award never precedes authorization (Authorize is exercised immediately before Rfs.Award, and its failure aborts before any IOU is created)
onLedgerSpendingMandate.privacyStory: a SpendMandate is signed by the principal and observed by the agent ONLY; the auditor is NOT a stakeholder (confidential by design) — testAuditorExcluded proves the auditor's query returns []
onLedgerSpendingMandate.ledgerHalfStatus: ACTIVATED on the real Canton devnet (2026-07-19). tacit-mandate DAR f3e2d2a9 uploaded; principal TacitPrincipal::1220a14c allocated + granted; SpendMandate created (limit 500, +250 live TopUp -> 750); TACIT_MANDATE_MODE=on live. Proven live: /api/mandate/status enabled, StandingMandatePanel, the 402 over-budget pre-check (zero writes), and an on-ledger TopUp. Marginal write-throttle: a FULL procurement burst still 503s (the honest-throttle ThrottleView engages), so a complete end-to-end procurement authorization+decrement and the live over-limit assertMsg are pending fuller write-recovery (both proven by the local daml:test:mandate matrix); finish via npm run preflight:mandate --deep.
onLedgerSpendingMandate.writeRecoveryProbe: 2026-07-19: one probe procurement through the live HTTPS API still returned the write-throttle (HTTP 403 'A security-sensitive error has been received', gRPC code 7). Still throttled; not polled further. Activation is captured in docs/ACTIVATION_RUNBOOK.md (a ~15-min, <=14-write sequence to run when writes recover).

honestThrottleUX.detection: shared/ledgerErrors.ts classifyLedgerError() — pure + unit-tested; maps the devnet write-throttle class (403 security-sensitive / PERMISSION_DENIED / gRPC 7 / RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED / 429) distinctly from an unreachable ledger and from genuine command failures
honestThrottleUX.route: /api/work/procure returns a distinct 503 with reason LEDGER_WRITE_THROTTLED + retryable:true (was a generic 502); nothing is started or spent
honestThrottleUX.ui: /work renders a DESIGNED Clear-material state (not a red error): 'Canton devnet is rate-limiting writes right now' — reads stay live, the job wasn't started, nothing spent, Try-again reuses the same jobId. Reactive-only (no write-canary). Verified locally against a mock throttled ledger (reads 200, submit 403) — screenshot captured at 1440.
honestThrottleUX.mcp: all three procure tools map the reason to a clean isError with the honest, non-fabricating message

services.note: second market vertical on the SAME frozen tacit-work template

determinism: score is a pure function of the report; buyer independently recomputes it from the report's own scoringBreakdown for BOTH services

marketSurface.source: live Canton contracts the auditor party can lawfully see (Settlement + DeliveryReceipt)
marketSurface.scope: work-path (receipts joined to settlements); totalVolume == Σ perService.volume == Σ provider.earned
marketSurface.treasuryVerification: independent raw-Canton auditor recompute + Iou reconciliation scoped to work-path

countingMethod: one assertion per individual check line; suite summary lines are not counted
liveVerificationNote: All unit suites + read-path assertions pass. The pricing fix is proven live: quotes collapsed to base on redeploy (B 98→35, A 74→32) and 8 real HTTPS jobs produced 2 distinct specialist winners (A@vendor, C@perf) with both default-budget jobs gathering 3 in-budget bids. Late in the session the hosted devnet began rejecting WRITES from this credential (HTTP 403 PERMISSION_DENIED on submit; reads unaffected) — a transient per-credential write-throttle after ~55 real jobs today, unrelated to app code (same deployed code ran 10 procurements successfully earlier). While active, preflight:market's read-path assertions (24) pass and the un-killable default-budget 3-bid guarantee is proven by scripts/live-8jobs.mjs; the preflight's own re-procurement should complete once the devnet write-quota resets.

suites.name: web performance probe (fixtures + live example.com + SSRF)
runner pricing model (live in-flight, lost-bid clears, per-service cost, load flip, JSON parse)
market aggregation (fixtures: normal / empty / degradation / winShare / cap / winsByService / recentWinShare / no-forbidden-fields)
planner decision logic (extractJson / repair prompt / fallback selection / repair-recovery / fallback-recovery / honest-failure — no mock server)
tacit-mandate on-ledger test matrix (authorize-decrements / over-limit-fails / service-scope / expiry / topup-restores / revoke / authority-separation / auditor-excluded — real Daml Script ledger)
spending-mandate pure logic unit (flag gate / precheck sufficient-insufficient-none-expired-scope / eligible-selection / idempotent-authorization)
ledger-error classification (real devnet 403 payload → throttled; permission_denied/429/resource_exhausted; unreachable distinct; genuine failures → other; empty-safe)
LIVE spending-mandate e2e (status readable / over-budget 402 zero-writes / on-ledger TopUp — PARTIAL)
suites.note: Executed live after activation: status/panel readable, the 402 over-budget pre-check refuses with zero writes, and TopUp succeeds on-ledger. The full-procurement checks (exact decrement, live over-limit assertMsg) are blocked by a MARGINAL devnet write-throttle (procurement bursts 503 -> the honest ThrottleView), so they are proven by daml:test:mandate (18) rather than here. Not counted in totals; re-run on fuller write-recovery to complete.

suites.name: LIVE buyer-agent console (key-aware: fail-closed hard gate + honest agents OR real hard-gated proposal + real console procurement)
LIVE auditor-view market (recompute + scoped Iou + recent-form/winsByService + ≥2 distinct recent winners + un-killable default-budget 3-bid)

totals.note: +3 suites / +32 assertions across the mandate + endgame passes, all local + green (tacit-mandate daml matrix 18, spending-mandate unit 8, ledger-error classification 6). The LIVE preflight:mandate is written but pending devnet write-recovery and is NOT counted.
